name: Macaroni and Cheese Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 Ounces Elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
12 Ounces Can of luncheon meat, cut into 1/4 inch strips
1/2 Cup Seasoned fine dry bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 2 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, melt butter or margarine in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds.
2. Blend flour, salt, pepper, and dry mustard in a bowl, stirring until smooth.
3. Gradually stir in milk until smooth.
4. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 10 minutes or until thickened and smooth. Stir frequently during the last half of cooking time.
5. Add shredded cheese and stir until melted.
6. Add cooked macaroni and luncheon meat. Stir until well blended.
7. In a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, combine melted butter or margarine and bread crumbs and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes or until bread crumbs are lightly browned.
8. Sprinkle bread crumb mixture over macaroni mixture.
9. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes or until heated through.
Variation: 2 1/2 cups of ham, tongue, turkey, other leftover meat, or other luncheon meat may be substituted for the canned luncheon-meat.
